name: medical clinics processing 10–20 insurance claims/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 insurance claims/month, inaccurate billing codes cause claim denials. We provide a coding assistant instead of manual coding by administrative staff.
problem_solved: inaccurate billing codes leading to claim denials
features: error checking for common coding mistakes
simple user interface for quick access
